case_title: DOROTHY CONNELLY VS. ANITA HAMIC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-13-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-12-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONNELLY, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT HAMIC, ANITA DOES I THROUGH X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-13-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-11-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-21-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-12-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-25-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 16140015)
